system.description:
DANGEROUS. FAST.

LEVEL 3

Electrical Dedication. You give up Spellshaper abilities and you can only cast lightning spells from now on. Choose 1 Ice or Fire spell and treat it as a Lightning spell.

Power Surge. After you cast a damaging spell, you may take 4 lightning damage to add 1d8 to the damage. While Charged, if you would become Charged again, gain Supercharged.

Supercharged Abilities. When Supercharged you may end the condition to use one of these abilities for free at any time.

  • Blur. Reduce ALL non-lightning damage you take by KEY this round.
  • Overload. When an enemy is damaged, add 1 maximized Power Surge Die.
  • Warp. Teleport up to 8 spaces away; you may swap places with a willing ally.

LEVEL 7

Jumpstart. Gain +INT Initiative. When you roll initiative, become Charged; on a result of 20+, become Supercharged instead.

Power Surge (2). Your Power Surge die becomes a d12.

LEVEL 11

Lingering Charge. (1/encounter) Use a Supercharged ability even if you are not Supercharged; that becomes Supercharged.

Conduit of Power. Whenever you would move while Charged, you may teleport instead.

LEVEL 15

Power Surge (3). Your Power Surge die becomes a d20.

Haywire. Whenever you use Power Surge, you may take 8 damage instead to become Supercharged.
